fbm_noise.name: FBM Noise
fbm_noise.description: Fractal Brownian Motion noise with octave layering. Classic procedural texture.

voronoi.name: Voronoi Cells
voronoi.description: Animated Voronoi cell pattern with distance-based coloring.

plasma.name: Plasma
plasma.description: Classic plasma effect with layered sine waves and rainbow palette.

spirograph.name: Spirograph
spirograph.description: Parametric spirograph pattern with glowing lines.

bloom.name: Bloom
bloom.description: Soft bloom/glow post-processing effect. Requires a TOP input.

chromatic_aberration.name: Chromatic Aberration
chromatic_aberration.description: RGB channel offset for a glitchy chromatic aberration look. Requires a TOP input.

edge_detect.name: Edge Detection
edge_detect.description: Sobel edge detection filter. Requires a TOP input.

uv_debug.name: UV Debug
uv_debug.description: Visualize UV coordinates as red/green gradient with grid lines.

checkerboard.name: Checkerboard
checkerboard.description: Animated checkerboard pattern with configurable size and colors.

basic_sdf.name: Basic SDF Raymarching
basic_sdf.description: Simple raymarched scene with a sphere, plane, and lighting. No inputs needed.
